Creating the branch: We created a new branch named pr-05-pr-hygiene to work on it.

Creating the folders: We created the .github and docs folders to organize the files.

Setting up the template: We created the file .github/pull_request_template.md and filled it with the required content to organize pull requests.

Creating the checklist: We created the file docs/pr-checklist.md to add a self-checklist for the code.

Updating the documentation: We edited the README.md file to add instructions on how to run.
